allow: Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./src/locales/en.json'\); console.log\('top-level newsletter keys:', Object.keys\(j.newsletter || {}\)\); console.log\('admin.newsletter keys:', Object.keys\(j.admin?.newsletter || {}\)\);")

PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 8; "tsc exit: $LASTEXITCODE"; npx next lint --file src/components/Lectures/LecturesCarouselView.tsx --file src/components/Login/login.tsx --file src/components/Contact/contact.tsx "--file" "src/app/auth/error/page.tsx" --file src/components/Home/CarouselSection.tsx --file src/components/Home/MixedCarouselSection.tsx --file src/components/Home/FeaturedCarouselSection.tsx 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 2; try { Get-Content src\\locales\\en.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; Get-Content src\\locales\\he.json -Raw -Encoding utf8 | ConvertFrom-Json | Out-Null; "locales OK" } catch { "locales INVALID" }; npx next build 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "Compiled|Failed" | Select-Object -First 1)
